feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: PO delivery address
entry.content:
Dear All,

When creating a Purchase Order, I have maintained the company code, plant, and storage location for the purchasing item.

However, I noticed that the delivery address for the PO item differs from the company code address maintained in IMG ("Edit Addresses for Company Codes").

Could you kindly advise if I might have missed any settings, or if there is a need to activate a specific scope in CBC?

Thank you in advance for your guidance.

entry.title: Sourcing and Procurement
entry.content: How to configure when GRN is done then the requisitioner get mail notification in grow with SAP?

entry.title: Creating Status Profile
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I'm looking for a way to create a custom user status profile similar to actions performed via Transaction BS02 in S/4HANA. Is there a provision for this in public cloud? 

Version: SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2502

Regards,

Dexter

entry.title: How to convert already created Regular Employee(BUP003) to Contract Employee(BBP005) or vice-versa
entry.content:
We want to know how to convert already created Regular Employee(BUP003) to Contract Employee(BBP005) or vice-versa.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to mass upload project demands.
entry.content:
Is there any functionality to upload demands for multiple material demands at once through the app 'Manage Project Demands'.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable extend standard cds view I_WBSElementData_2
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement to extend standard cds view in public cloud.

I_WBSElementData_2 

I have checked its details in api.sap.com

But I dont find business context "Appl Interface WBSElement Details (PS_WBSELEMENT)" in public cloud.

Can you please help on this? Any idea how can we extend this cds?

Regards,

Jagadhatri

ABAP Extensibility SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Automatic Payment Approval and Payment Voucher
entry.content:
Dear All 

We are using SAP Public Cloud and requirement is to print the payments vouchers and also having an approval process.

Not having license for SAP Bank Communication Management hence App Approve Bank Payment is not available.

Is there any option to enable , to print the payment vouchers like through Create Correspondence App, standard available correspondence types not having option to print payment vouchers.

Secondly is there any possibility/workaround to approve the payments before actually posting those through Manage Automatic Payment or Post Outgoing Payment App.

entry.title: PO Status in Manage Purchase Order
entry.content:
I would like to know if there is any available API which include PO Invoiced status.

Best Regards,

Khaing ZIn

entry.title: Unable to create delivery in public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

i have created a sales order in public cloud of three line item, when i am trying to create a delivery only one line item is appearing in the delivery screen. and for rest two line item i am getting below error. please guide me with the solution.

entry.title: SAP Credit Management Limitation for Multi-Currency Customers
entry.content:
How to Assign more than one credit segment for the business partner (customer) to operate with different currencies?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Where to maintain ISLM Connection mapping in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: I was following multiple blogs to understand what is ISLM. There was a place where they were doing configuration in ISLM Connection mapping in SPRO. How to do that in S/4HANA Public Cloud version.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Workflows Creation
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

We have a requirement to create workflows / approvals for below processes with SAP Public Cloud as standard flexible workflows are not available.

  1. Outgoing Payment Approval
  2. Cost Center Supplement Budget Approval
  3. Project Supplement Budget Approval

Note client is not having PSM or licenses for J78 Scope item. Is there any alternate or customizing option to have approvals or sending at least notification to next person.

entry.title: [REQ 2YM] SAP_COM_0256 doesn't show up
entry.content:
Came out of a customer case:

Scope item was activated but the SAP_COM_0256 communication scenario does't show up in the Manage Communication Scenario app, why?

entry.title: Is there a method to effectively clear these fixed asset depreciation records?
entry.content:
The customer has identified that there are hundreds of assets with accumulated depreciation amounts recorded for last year. They would like to clear this data from the production environment ahead of the second go live.

Could you advise if there is a method to effectively clear these depreciation records?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Missing copying control setting from sales order to billing document in public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Since the combination of Target Document Type (OR) and Item Category (TAN) against the Billing Document Type (F2) is not supported in the public cloud scope, could you please suggest an alternative approach to achieve our requirement? Does anyone have the same scenario?

Specifically, we need to update custom fields from the billing document to the sales order header during the billing process. Is there a recommended workaround or an alternative configuration that can be implemented within the available public cloud functionalities?

Thank you!

entry.title: #COE#BUMA Automate Update from Successfactors to Concur
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a possible way to automate the update of cost center from Successfactor to Concur?

Do you have suggestions?

Regards!

entry.title: Mannual Reservation workflows
entry.content:
Dear Team 

Please suggest any workfolw for Mannual Reservation in sap public cloude requirement approval process Mannual Reservation.

entry.title: Enhancement Requirement for Custom Reports – Like MB52 Report
entry.content:
We have a requirement to enhance our custom report with functionality similar to the standard MB52 report. Specifically, we need:
1. Collapse/Expand Functionality – The ability to collapse and expand data groups in the report, just like in MB52, to improve readability and navigation.

2. Grand Total by Unit of Measure (UOM) – A feature that aggregates and displays the grand total based on different UOMs to provide a clearer summary of stock quantities.Please advise on how we can achieve this functionality in our custom report or if any standard SAP solution is available for this requirement.

entry.title: How to Dynamically Change the Task Title in Workflow Notifications?
entry.content:
Hi. 

I have configured a Purchase Requisition workflow. When a purchase requisition is created, a notification is triggered as shown in the screenshot below.

Instead of displaying the Purchase Requisition number, I would like to show the description or name of the Purchase Requisition.

The "Redefined Task Title" setting available in the "Manage Workflow for Purchase Requisitions" app cannot be used as it does not allow dynamic data to be set. Is there any way to dynamically change the task title using custom logic or an app?

entry.title: How does the "Sequence Number" tab retrieve data?
entry.content:
How does the "Sequence Number" tab retrieve data in the report "TH_VAT_RTN"? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
